title: Verify structured CLASSIFY invocation
preconditions: Published operations, valid and malformed requests, every expected error category, incompatible versions, and missing mutation metadata are available.
steps: Invoke each request through the documented process path; capture stdout, stderr, and exit code; exercise unknown fields, incompatibility, missing actor, and missing idempotency.
expected: FR-CLASSIFY-STRUCTURED-INVOCATION holds: one business envelope and stable exit are returned, validation and compatibility fail before effects, and diagnostics remain metadata-only.
